input_text: Hospital kerajaan ni memang sengaja buat orang tunggu sampai mati ke? 6 jam tunggu nombor pun tak dipanggil. Staff kat kaunter lagi, muka masam macam kita hutang dia.
reason: Hyperbolic frustration about public hospital wait times with rude generalisation of staff attitude. Borderline personal attack on frontline workers.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu di hospital kerajaan agak lama. Harap pihak pengurusan dapat tingkatkan kecekapan perkhidmatan kaunter.

input_text: MBPJ ni wujud untuk apa sebenarnya? Longkang tersumbat sebulan dah report, takde sapa datang. Gaji buta je kerja dorang.
reason: Dismisses local council workers as freeloaders. Sarcastic attack on MBPJ staff competence.
suggested_rewrite: Laporan longkang tersumbat telah dibuat sebulan lalu tetapi belum ada tindakan dari MBPJ. Harap perkara ini dapat disusuli segera.

input_text: Tabung Haji punya pengurusan memang tahap kangkung la. Duit orang nak pergi haji pun boleh main-main. Malu weh.
reason: Cynical commentary on Tabung Haji management using dismissive language. Touches on religious institution trust issues.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurusan Tabung Haji perlu lebih telus dan bertanggungjawab dalam menguruskan dana jemaah haji.

input_text: Toll naik lagi? Memang la kerajaan ni nak perah rakyat sampai kering. Jalan pun berlubang tapi toll mahal gila.
reason: Angry reaction to toll increases with accusation of government exploitation. Polarising rhetoric about rakyat being squeezed dry.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan tol perlu seiring dengan penambahbaikan kualiti jalan raya. Rakyat berharap kerajaan mengkaji semula kadar tol.

input_text: Orang Selangor ni memang sombong. Ingat duduk KL area tu hebat sangat. Padahal sama je stuck dalam jam.
reason: Passive-aggressive stereotyping of people from Selangor as arrogant. Mild inter-state prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Kesesakan lalu lintas adalah masalah yang dihadapi semua penduduk di Lembah Klang tanpa mengira negeri asal.

input_text: Bomoh-bomoh ni semua penipu la. Orang kampung kena tipu hari-hari, siap bayar ribu-ribu untuk air jampi yang takde kesan.
reason: Blanket dismissal of all traditional healers as frauds. Disrespects cultural and traditional beliefs common in Malaysian society.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat perlu lebih berhati-hati memilih pengamal perubatan tradisional. Pastikan rawatan yang diterima selamat dan tidak menggantikan perubatan moden.

input_text: KWSP kononnya simpanan masa depan tapi bagi keluarkan awal pastu salahkan rakyat tak cukup duit pencen. Pelik betul logik dorang.
reason: Cynical take on KWSP policy contradictions. Mocking tone undermines institutional credibility without constructive criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Polisi KWSP mengenai pengeluaran awal perlu dikaji semula agar tidak menjejaskan simpanan persaraan rakyat dalam jangka panjang.

input_text: Pergi klinik kerajaan pukul 7 pagi, balik pukul 3 petang. Doktor jumpa 5 minit je. Sistem apa ni? Memang tak hormat masa orang.
reason: Frustrated rant about public clinic inefficiency. Implies disrespect toward healthcare system with rude tone.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu di klinik kerajaan sangat lama berbanding durasi rawatan. Sistem temu janji perlu diperbaiki untuk keselesaan pesakit.

input_text: Orang Johor semua rasa negeri dia paling best. Padahal nak lintas ke Singapura pun jam berjam-jam. Best sangat la tu.
reason: Sarcastic mocking of Johor residents' state pride. Passive-aggressive inter-state comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Kesesakan di sempadan Johor-Singapura memang mencabar. Harap infrastruktur sempadan dapat dipertingkatkan.

input_text: Dah la DBKL tutup jalan sesuka hati, parking pun mahal gila. Memang nak halau orang dari KL ke apa?
reason: Rude accusation that DBKL deliberately makes KL inaccessible. Hyperbolic frustration about urban planning.
suggested_rewrite: Penutupan jalan dan kenaikan kadar parking di KL menyukarkan penduduk. DBKL perlu berkomunikasi lebih awal mengenai perubahan ini.

input_text: Makcik kaunter hospital tu memang jenis suka tengok orang sakit tunggu lama. Senyum pun taknak, apatah lagi nak tolong cepat.
reason: Personal attack on hospital counter staff, attributing malicious intent. Rude generalisation of frontline workers.
suggested_rewrite: Layanan di kaunter hospital boleh diperbaiki dengan latihan khidmat pelanggan yang lebih baik untuk kakitangan.

input_text: Malay guys on dating apps semua sama je. Sweet talk habis tapi lepas dapat number, ghost terus. Jangan buang masa aku.
reason: Ethnic stereotyping in dating context. Generalises all Malay men as dishonest in relationships.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman saya dengan beberapa lelaki di aplikasi dating kurang baik. Harap semua lebih jujur dalam komunikasi.

input_text: Tol Plus naik lagi 15 sen tapi jalan highway sama je berlubang. Duit tu pergi mana sebenarnya? Memang syarikat penyamun.
reason: Labels toll company as robbers. Aggressive rhetoric about toll hikes without constructive engagement.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan tol sepatutnya disertai dengan penyelenggaraan jalan yang lebih baik. Rakyat berhak mendapat penjelasan tentang penggunaan hasil kutipan tol.

input_text: Orang Kelantan cakap loghat dia, orang lain tak faham pun tak kisah. Sombong ke apa? Macam la bahasa dorang tu paling betul.
reason: Dismissive stereotyping of Kelantanese dialect speakers as arrogant. Inter-state linguistic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Loghat Kelantan memang unik dan kadang sukar difahami. Kepelbagaian dialek adalah kekayaan budaya Malaysia.

input_text: Clinic kerajaan bagi ubat paracetamol je untuk semua penyakit. Sakit kepala paracetamol, sakit perut paracetamol. Doktor ke robot ni?
reason: Mocks government clinic doctors as robotic and incompetent. Dismissive of public healthcare professionals.
suggested_rewrite: Rawatan di klinik kerajaan kadang terasa terhad. Mungkin sumber dan masa yang terhad menjadi faktor. Harap kualiti rawatan dapat ditingkatkan.

input_text: MBSA buat kerja ke tak ni? Sampah merata-rata, lampu jalan rosak, tapi cukai pintu naik setiap tahun. Duit rakyat pergi mana?
reason: Sarcastic questioning of MBSA competence with insinuation of mismanagement. Inflammatory tone about local governance.
suggested_rewrite: Terdapat beberapa isu penyelenggaraan di kawasan MBSA seperti sampah dan lampu jalan rosak. Harap kenaikan cukai pintu disertai peningkatan perkhidmatan.

input_text: Bomoh cari MH370 tu dah cukup buktikan betapa mundurnya pemikiran sesetengah orang. Tahun 2024 masih percaya jampi serapah.
reason: Dismisses traditional healing practices as backward. Insults those who hold cultural beliefs about bomoh.
suggested_rewrite: Pencarian MH370 memerlukan pendekatan berasaskan sains dan teknologi. Masyarakat perlu menilai kaedah secara rasional.

input_text: Tabung Haji invest dalam hartanah rugi berbilion tapi pengurusan masih boleh senyum. Duit haji orang tua kita tu weh. Malu la sikit.
reason: Cynical attack on Tabung Haji investment decisions. Emotionally charged language about religious savings institution.
suggested_rewrite: Kerugian pelaburan Tabung Haji perlu disiasat dan dipertanggungjawabkan. Pendeposit berhak mendapat ketelusan penuh.

input_text: Budak-budak Sabah Sarawak datang KL terus kena pandang rendah. Orang Semenanjung ingat dorang tinggal atas pokok ke apa?
reason: Highlights and reinforces stereotyping of East Malaysians. Though sympathetic, perpetuates the 'backward' narrative.
suggested_rewrite: Pelajar dari Sabah dan Sarawak kadang menghadapi prasangka di Semenanjung. Kita perlu lebih menghargai kepelbagaian rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Pergi hospital Sungai Buloh semalam, nurse tu macam nak gaduh je. Aku tanya soalan baik-baik pun kena marah. Service apa macam ni?
reason: Describes a specific nurse encounter in hostile terms. While frustration may be valid, the tone attacks the individual.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman di Hospital Sungai Buloh semalam kurang memuaskan. Harap latihan komunikasi untuk kakitangan dapat dipertingkatkan.

input_text: Orang Penang memang kedekut, tu yang famous. Bukan aku cakap, semua orang tahu. Nak belanja kawan pun kira sen.
reason: Perpetuates stereotype of Penangites as stingy. Presents prejudice as universally accepted fact.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Penang dikenali sebagai pandai berjimat cermat. Sikap berhemah dengan wang adalah sifat yang boleh dipuji.

input_text: KWSP kata simpanan rakyat tak cukup untuk bersara, tapi siapa yang bagi keluarkan masa COVID? Sendiri buat masalah, sendiri salahkan rakyat.
reason: Blames KWSP for retirement fund shortfalls while oversimplifying the policy trade-offs during COVID.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar pengeluaran KWSP semasa COVID mempunyai kesan jangka panjang. Perlu ada langkah komprehensif untuk membantu rakyat membina semula simpanan persaraan.

input_text: Jalan DBKL maintain macam jalan kampung zaman penjajah. Pothole sana sini tapi tender berjuta-juta. Duit masuk poket siapa ni?
reason: Insinuates corruption in DBKL road maintenance tenders. Inflammatory accusation without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti jalan di bawah pengurusan DBKL perlu diperbaiki. Proses tender penyelenggaraan jalan patut lebih telus.

input_text: Dating app ni, perempuan Cina semua nak lelaki kaya je. Profile belum baca, tengok kereta dulu. Materialistik tahap dewa.
reason: Ethnic and gender stereotyping of Chinese women as materialistic in dating context.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah orang di aplikasi dating lebih mementingkan status kewangan. Setiap individu mempunyai keutamaan yang berbeza.

input_text: Hospital kerajaan emergency room pun kena tunggu 4 jam. Kalau betul-betul emergency, mati dulu baru dapat rawatan ke?
reason: Hyperbolic claim about dying before receiving treatment. Dramatic rhetoric about ER wait times.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu di unit kecemasan hospital kerajaan perlu dikurangkan. Sistem triaj yang lebih efisien boleh membantu pesakit kritikal mendapat rawatan segera.

input_text: Orang KL semua berlagak. Balik kampung masa raya pun nak tunjuk kereta besar. Padahal gaji pun tak seberapa, loan 9 tahun.
reason: Stereotypes KL residents as show-offs with financial overextension. Passive-aggressive inter-regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Tekanan sosial untuk menunjukkan kejayaan material semasa pulang kampung adalah cabaran yang dihadapi ramai orang bandar.

input_text: Majlis perbandaran buat kerja macam siput. Report potholes bulan lepas, sampai sekarang takde tindakan. Bayar cukai untuk apa?
reason: Dismissive comparison of council workers to snails. Sarcastic frustration about municipal responsiveness.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan mengenai jalan berlubang yang dibuat sebulan lalu masih belum ditangani. Harap majlis perbandaran mempercepatkan tindakan.

input_text: Bomoh moden sekarang guna Instagram promote rawatan. Packaging cantik tapi isi tetap karut. Orang bodoh je yang percaya.
reason: Calls believers of modern traditional healers stupid. Dismisses cultural practices while insulting their followers.
suggested_rewrite: Pengamal perubatan tradisional yang menggunakan media sosial perlu dikawal selia. Pengguna disarankan menilai sebarang tawaran rawatan secara kritikal.

input_text: Tol naik, minyak naik, gula naik. Gaji je tak naik. Memang sengaja nak buat rakyat jadi hamba abdi ke?
reason: Accuses government of deliberately enslaving citizens through cost increases. Emotionally charged, polarising rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan kos sara hidup yang tidak seiring dengan pertumbuhan gaji memberi tekanan kepada rakyat. Kerajaan perlu mengkaji langkah pembaharuan ekonomi.

input_text: MBPJ buat roundabout baru yang tak masuk akal. Dulu smooth je lalu situ, sekarang jam teruk. Perancang bandar tidur ke masa design ni?
reason: Mocks urban planners as sleeping on the job. Rude dismissal of professional competence.
suggested_rewrite: Bulatan baru MBPJ nampaknya menyebabkan kesesakan lalu lintas yang lebih teruk. Harap kajian impak trafik dilakukan sebelum pembinaan projek seumpama ini.

input_text: Klinik kesihatan bagi MC pun kedekut. Sakit teruk tapi doktor kata rehat satu hari cukup. Dia ingat kita robot ke?
reason: Implies government clinic doctors are heartless and treat patients like robots. Rude frustration directed at medical professionals.
suggested_rewrite: Tempoh cuti sakit yang diberikan kadang terasa tidak mencukupi. Doktor mungkin mempunyai garis panduan tertentu tetapi komunikasi yang lebih baik dengan pesakit diperlukan.

input_text: KWSP dah jadi macam ATM kerajaan. Setiap kali ekonomi teruk, suruh rakyat keluarkan duit sendiri. Lepas tu salahkan rakyat tak simpan.
reason: Characterises KWSP as the government's personal ATM. Cynical oversimplification of retirement fund policy.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar pengeluaran KWSP perlu lebih berstrategi agar tidak menjejaskan simpanan persaraan rakyat dalam jangka panjang.

input_text: Nurse kat wad tu siap boleh tengok phone lagi masa pesakit panggil. Gaji makan free ke? Orang sakit nak perhatian la weh.
reason: Accuses nurses of neglect and receiving undeserved pay. Personal attack on healthcare worker professionalism.
suggested_rewrite: Perhatian segera kepada pesakit di wad adalah penting. Harap pengurusan hospital dapat memastikan kakitangan fokus semasa bertugas.

input_text: Tabung Haji dulu bersih sekarang dah jadi macam syarikat GLC biasa. Politikus masuk campur, duit rakyat jadi mangsa. Hancur.
reason: Claims political interference has corrupted Tabung Haji. Emotionally charged language about a sensitive religious savings institution.
suggested_rewrite: Tabung Haji perlu diurus secara profesional tanpa campur tangan politik agar keyakinan pendeposit terpelihara.

input_text: Orang Kedah semua nak cakap besar tapi kerja tak seberapa. Bukan nak stereotype tapi memang nampak pattern la.
reason: Self-aware stereotyping of Kedah people that still perpetuates prejudice despite the disclaimer.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu berbeza tanpa mengira asal negeri. Menilai seseorang berdasarkan stereotip tidaklah adil.

input_text: Government hospitals should just be honest and say they don't have enough staff instead of making patients wait 8 hours for a 3-minute consultation.
reason: Cynical demand for honesty from public hospitals. Implies deliberate deception about resource limitations.
suggested_rewrite: Government hospitals face staffing challenges that lead to long wait times. Greater transparency about resource constraints could help manage patient expectations.

input_text: MBPJ officers only know how to give summons but can't even fix a broken traffic light for months. Selective efficiency at its finest.
reason: Sarcastic attack on MBPJ enforcement officers. Implies deliberate selective effort to generate revenue.
suggested_rewrite: MBPJ should balance enforcement activities with timely infrastructure maintenance like repairing traffic lights.

input_text: Every Malay guy I've matched with on Tinder just wants to 'get to know you' at 2am. Sure bro, real gentleman move there.
reason: Ethnic stereotyping of Malay men as having ulterior motives in dating. Sarcastic generalisation based on race.
suggested_rewrite: Some people on dating apps have questionable intentions regardless of background. Setting clear boundaries early helps filter out those who aren't serious.

input_text: Toll rates go up every year but the highway still floods every monsoon season. Where exactly is the maintenance money going? Someone's pocket, probably.
reason: Insinuates corruption in highway maintenance funding. Unsubstantiated accusation framed as rhetorical question.
suggested_rewrite: Highway flooding during monsoon season raises questions about the adequacy of maintenance despite toll increases. Greater accountability is needed from concessionaires.

input_text: Selangor people think they're so sophisticated just because they live near KL. Come to Perak and see real culture, not your overpriced hipster cafes.
reason: Passive-aggressive inter-state comparison that dismisses Selangor lifestyle as superficial and positions Perak as culturally superior.
suggested_rewrite: Both Selangor and Perak have unique cultural offerings. Malaysia's diversity means every state has something special to appreciate.

input_text: Going to a bomoh in 2024 is basically admitting you've given up on logic. Just go see a real doctor ffs.
reason: Dismisses traditional healing as illogical. Insults those who consult bomoh as having abandoned reason.
suggested_rewrite: While modern medicine should be the primary option, some people find comfort in traditional practices. It's important that both approaches don't conflict.

input_text: KWSP letting people withdraw during COVID was the worst financial decision. Now half the country has zero retirement savings. Genius move, really.
reason: Sarcastic dismissal of KWSP COVID withdrawal policy. Oversimplifies a complex emergency economic decision.
suggested_rewrite: The KWSP COVID withdrawal policy had long-term consequences on retirement savings. A balanced review of the policy's impact is necessary.

input_text: DBKL's idea of urban planning is basically slapping a new mall next to another mall. Zero creativity, maximum traffic chaos.
reason: Mocks DBKL planners as uncreative. Dismissive of urban development decisions with exaggerated criticism.
suggested_rewrite: KL's urban planning could benefit from more diverse commercial developments rather than concentrating malls in already congested areas.

input_text: Chinese girls on dating apps always ask 'what car you drive' within the first 5 messages. It's like a job interview, not a date.
reason: Ethnic and gender stereotyping of Chinese women as materialistic in dating scenarios.
suggested_rewrite: Some people on dating apps prioritize financial status early on. Everyone has different priorities when looking for a partner.

input_text: The staff at HKL emergency department have the warmth of a frozen fish. You could be bleeding out and they'd still ask you to take a number.
reason: Dehumanises HKL emergency staff as cold and uncaring. Exaggerated attack on healthcare worker empathy.
suggested_rewrite: The emergency department at HKL can feel impersonal due to high patient volumes. Better triage communication could improve the patient experience.

input_text: Johor people act like JB is the next Singapore. Mate, you literally cross the causeway to buy groceries because your own economy can't compete.
reason: Mocks Johor residents' aspirations by highlighting economic dependence on Singapore. Inter-state belittlement.
suggested_rewrite: Johor's proximity to Singapore creates unique economic dynamics. There's potential for JB to develop its own competitive advantages.

input_text: Tabung Haji managed to lose billions in bad investments and nobody went to jail. If that's not Malaysia Boleh, I don't know what is.
reason: Cynical commentary using 'Malaysia Boleh' sarcastically to criticise lack of accountability in Tabung Haji losses.
suggested_rewrite: The investment losses at Tabung Haji raise serious accountability questions. Depositors deserve to know what measures are being taken to prevent future losses.

input_text: Government clinic pharmacists just dump a bag of generic pills at you with zero explanation. Would it kill them to tell you what the side effects are?
reason: Portrays government pharmacists as dismissive and uncaring. Rude generalisation of healthcare professionals.
suggested_rewrite: Government clinic pharmacists should be given more time to explain medication details to patients. Proper counselling improves treatment outcomes.

input_text: MBSA just approved another housing development in an already flooded area. Brilliant planning as always. Can't wait to see homes underwater again next monsoon.
reason: Sarcastic attack on MBSA's development approvals in flood-prone areas. Implies deliberate negligence.
suggested_rewrite: New housing developments in flood-prone areas under MBSA jurisdiction need thorough environmental impact assessments to protect future residents.

input_text: Traditional healers in Malaysia are just placebos with extra steps. You're paying for someone to wave leaves over you. Wake up, people.
reason: Blanket dismissal of all traditional healing as placebo. Condescending tone toward those who hold cultural beliefs.
suggested_rewrite: Traditional healing practices should be evaluated alongside evidence-based medicine. People deserve accurate information to make informed health decisions.

input_text: KWSP says we need RM240k minimum to retire. Most Malaysians have less than RM50k. But sure, let's pretend the system is working.
reason: Cynical take on the retirement savings gap. Sarcastically implies the system is fundamentally broken without constructive engagement.
suggested_rewrite: The gap between recommended retirement savings and actual KWSP balances is concerning. Comprehensive strategies are needed to help Malaysians build adequate retirement funds.

input_text: Every time I go to a government hospital, I lose a little more faith in humanity. The apathy of the admin staff is honestly impressive.
reason: Describes hospital admin staff as impressively apathetic. Backhanded insult against frontline healthcare workers.
suggested_rewrite: Government hospital admin processes can be improved. Better support systems for administrative staff could enhance the overall patient experience.

input_text: Indians on dating apps always bring up horoscope compatibility within the first date. Bro it's 2024 not some arranged marriage interview.
reason: Stereotypes Indian Malaysians based on cultural practices in dating. Dismisses astrological beliefs as outdated.
suggested_rewrite: Some people value astrological compatibility in relationships due to cultural tradition. Different approaches to dating reflect diverse backgrounds.

input_text: Penang drivers are the worst in Malaysia and that's saying something. Every lane is their lane, every signal is optional.
reason: Regional stereotyping of Penang drivers. Generalises all drivers from one state negatively.
suggested_rewrite: Traffic behaviour in Penang can be challenging for visitors. Better enforcement and driver education could improve road safety across Malaysia.

input_text: DBKL flower pots cost RM1,000 each apparently. Must be gold-plated orchids. This city runs on overpriced nonsense.
reason: Sarcastic insinuation of corruption in DBKL procurement spending. Inflammatory rhetoric about public funds.
suggested_rewrite: Questions about DBKL's procurement costs for public decorations deserve transparent answers. Public spending should be well-documented and justified.

input_text: Toll booths still using manual payment in 2024. Even warung tepi jalan accept QR payment now. Highway companies living in the stone age.
reason: Mocks highway companies as technologically backward. Dismissive comparison to roadside stalls.
suggested_rewrite: Highway payment systems could benefit from wider adoption of cashless technology to reduce congestion at toll plazas.

input_text: Malaysian government clinics treat you like cattle. Line up, get prodded, take your pills, next. No dignity in the process at all.
reason: Dehumanising comparison of public healthcare to livestock processing. Attacks the dignity of the system and its workers.
suggested_rewrite: Government clinic processes can feel impersonal due to high patient volumes. More patient-centred care approaches could improve the experience for everyone.

input_text: Really cannot tahan these council people. MBPJ charge premium rates for garbage collection but my area still got rubbish everywhere on weekends.
reason: Frustrated attack on MBPJ garbage collection service despite payment. Implies workers are not doing their jobs.
suggested_rewrite: Garbage collection frequency in my area seems insufficient for weekends despite regular payments. MBPJ should consider increasing weekend collection schedules.

input_text: KWSP investment returns getting worse every year but management still getting bonuses. Classic Malaysian institution mentality — fail upwards.
reason: Cynical criticism of KWSP management bonuses despite declining returns. Generalises to all Malaysian institutions.
suggested_rewrite: KWSP management compensation should be tied to investment performance. Transparency in bonus structures would build contributor confidence.

input_text: Penang bridge toll for what? Every raya jam 6 hours, no improvement in decades. Might as well swim across la cheaper.
reason: Sarcastic dismissal of Penang bridge toll value. Exaggerated rhetoric about congestion with no acknowledgment of infrastructure efforts.
suggested_rewrite: Penang bridge congestion during festive seasons remains a challenge. Alternative solutions like improved public transport connections could complement the existing infrastructure.

input_text: 政府医院排队排到天荒地老，护士还一副欠她钱的样子。这种服务态度真的让人无语。
reason: Attacks government hospital nurses as having terrible attitudes. Rude generalisation of healthcare staff in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 政府医院等候时间较长，希望管理层能改善服务流程和员工培训。

input_text: MBPJ的效率简直是蜗牛级别的。投诉了三个月的路洞还在那里，纳税人的钱都去哪了？
reason: Compares MBPJ efficiency to snails. Sarcastic questioning of how taxpayer money is spent.
suggested_rewrite: MBPJ处理路面维修投诉的效率有待提高。希望市政厅能加快处理居民的反馈。

input_text: 马来男生谈恋爱都一个样，嘴巴甜得要命但承诺从来不算数。交友软件上遇到的都是这种。
reason: Ethnic stereotyping of Malay men in dating as sweet-talking but unreliable. Racial generalisation in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 在交友软件上遇到不诚实的人是常见的体验，不应以种族来归类这种行为。

input_text: 现在还去看bomoh的人脑子是不是有问题？都什么年代了还信这些封建迷信。
reason: Insults bomoh believers as mentally deficient. Dismisses traditional practices as feudal superstition.
suggested_rewrite: 虽然现代医学应优先考虑，但一些人仍重视传统疗法。我们应尊重不同的信仰选择。

input_text: 过路费年年涨，路况年年差。高速公路公司赚得盆满钵满，老百姓的钱就这样被吸走了。
reason: Portrays highway companies as blood-sucking entities exploiting citizens. Inflammatory rhetoric about toll increases.
suggested_rewrite: 过路费上涨应伴随道路质量的提升。公众有权了解收费的用途和公路维护计划。

input_text: 雪兰莪人整天觉得自己比其他州的人高级。拜托，你们州的水供问题都解决不了还好意思看不起别人？
reason: Passive-aggressive inter-state comparison mocking Selangor residents while highlighting their water supply issues.
suggested_rewrite: 每个州都有各自的优势和挑战。雪兰莪的水供问题和其他州的问题一样值得关注和改善。

input_text: KWSP说我们退休金不够，可是是谁批准提前取款的？自己挖的坑现在怪老百姓跳进去。
reason: Blames KWSP for creating the retirement savings crisis through early withdrawal policies. Cynical blame-shifting accusation.
suggested_rewrite: KWSP提前取款政策的长期影响需要全面评估。政府和公积金局应合作制定更可持续的退休保障方案。

input_text: 去政府诊所看病，医生三分钟就打发你走了。给的药永远是paracetamol。这种医疗服务真是绝了。
reason: Sarcastically dismisses government clinic consultations as rushed and generic. Implies doctors are incompetent.
suggested_rewrite: 政府诊所的就诊时间较短，可能是因为病患人数多。希望能增加医护人员以改善诊疗质量。

input_text: 华人女生在交友app上第一句就问你开什么车住哪里。感情不是拍卖会好吗？太现实了。
reason: Stereotypes Chinese women on dating apps as materialistic and transactional. Ethnic and gender prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: 有些人在交友时看重物质条件，但不应以族群来概括这种行为。每个人择偶标准不同。

input_text: 朝圣基金局投资亏损几十亿，没人负责没人坐牢。普通老百姓欠银行一万块就被追到天涯海角。双重标准。
reason: Cynical comparison highlighting perceived double standards in accountability between Tabung Haji and ordinary citizens.
suggested_rewrite: 朝圣基金局的投资亏损需要严肃追究责任。建立完善的问责机制对维护公众信任至关重要。

input_text: DBKL每年花几百万搞什么花卉节，路上的坑洞都没人管。优先级搞反了吧？
reason: Criticises DBKL spending priorities with sarcastic tone. Implies deliberate misallocation of public funds.
suggested_rewrite: DBKL在举办活动的同时也应注重基础设施维护。合理分配预算能更好地服务市民。

input_text: 柔佛人总觉得自己是南方之虎很了不起。拜托，你们的交通堵塞和基建问题还不够多吗？
reason: Mocks Johor residents' state pride by highlighting infrastructure problems. Inter-state belittlement in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 柔佛有其独特的优势，但交通和基础设施问题确实需要改善。每个州都有进步的空间。

input_text: 传统巫医现在都开始用社交媒体卖草药了。包装高大上内容还是那套骗人的东西。
reason: Dismisses all traditional medicine sold via social media as scams. Blanket condemnation of cultural practices.
suggested_rewrite: 通过社交媒体售卖的传统草药产品应受到适当监管，以确保消费者安全和产品质量。

input_text: 印度男生在dating app上第一次约会就谈星座合不合。拜托，这又不是相亲节目，能不能正常聊天？
reason: Stereotypes Indian men on dating apps as obsessed with horoscope compatibility. Ethnic generalisation in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 一些人在约会时重视星座兼容性，这是文化传统的一部分。不同的交友方式反映了多元的文化背景。

input_text: 每次去政府医院都像打仗一样。排队排到腿软，工作人员还爱理不理的。纳税人的尊严在哪里？
reason: Describes government hospital visits as battles. Attacks staff attitude and questions taxpayer dignity.
suggested_rewrite: 政府医院的等候时间确实较长。希望能通过增加人手和改善流程来提升服务体验。

input_text: அரசு மருத்துவமனையில் 6 மணி நேரம் காத்திருந்தும் மருத்துவரை 5 நிமிடம் தான் பார்க்க முடிந்தது. கவுண்டர் ஊழியர்கள் முகத்தில் எரிச்சல் மட்டுமே.
reason: Frustrated rant about government hospital wait times with rude generalisation of counter staff as perpetually irritated.
suggested_rewrite: அரசு மருத்துவமனையில் காத்திருப்பு நேரம் அதிகமாக உள்ளது. சேவையின் தரத்தை மேம்படுத்த நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: MBPJ-யின் செயல்திறன் நத்தையை விட மோசம். புகார் கொடுத்து மூன்று மாதம் ஆகியும் எந்த நடவடிக்கையும் இல்லை. வரி பணம் எங்கே போகிறது?
reason: Compares MBPJ efficiency to worse than a snail. Aggressive questioning of where tax money goes in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: MBPJ புகார்களை விரைவாக கையாள வேண்டும். மூன்று மாதங்களாக தீர்க்கப்படாத புகார்கள் கவலையளிக்கின்றன.

input_text: டேட்டிங் ஆப்பில் மலாய் பையன்கள் எல்லாரும் ஒரே மாதிரி. இனிமையாக பேசுவார்கள், பிறகு காணாமல் போய்விடுவார்கள். நம்பவே முடியாது.
reason: Ethnic stereotyping of Malay men in dating as sweet-talkers who ghost. Racial generalisation in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: டேட்டிங் ஆப்பில் சிலர் நேர்மையாக இல்லை. இது இனத்தைச் சார்ந்தது அல்ல, தனிநபர் நடத்தை.

input_text: போமோ பார்க்கிறவர்கள் இன்னும் இருக்கிறார்கள் என்றால் நம்ப முடியவில்லை. 21ஆம் நூற்றாண்டில் மந்திரம் நம்புகிறார்களா? மூடத்தனம்.
reason: Calls belief in bomoh foolishness. Dismisses traditional healing practices as incompatible with modern era.
suggested_rewrite: பாரம்பரிய நம்பிக்கைகளை மதிக்க வேண்டும், ஆனால் நவீன மருத்துவத்தை முன்னுரிமையாகக் கருத வேண்டும்.

input_text: சுங்கச்சாவடி கட்டணம் மீண்டும் உயர்ந்துள்ளது ஆனால் சாலை நிலை மோசமாகவே உள்ளது. நம் பணம் எங்கே போகிறது? கொள்ளையர்கள்.
reason: Labels toll companies as robbers in Tamil. Inflammatory language about toll hikes and road conditions.
suggested_rewrite: சுங்கக் கட்டண உயர்வுக்கு ஏற்ப சாலை பராமரிப்பும் மேம்பட வேண்டும். வெளிப்படையான கணக்கு தேவை.

input_text: KWSP-யில் ஓய்வூதியத்திற்கு போதுமான சேமிப்பு இல்லை என்கிறார்கள். ஆனால் COVID நேரத்தில் எடுக்க அனுமதித்தது யார்? தங்கள் தவறை மக்கள் மேல் சுமத்துகிறார்கள்.
reason: Blames KWSP for retirement shortfall due to COVID withdrawal policy. Accusatory tone shifting blame to institution.
suggested_rewrite: COVID காலத்தில் KWSP பணம் எடுக்க அனுமதித்ததின் நீண்டகால விளைவுகளை ஆராய வேண்டும். ஓய்வூதிய சேமிப்பை மீட்டெடுக்க திட்டங்கள் தேவை.

input_text: செலாங்கூர் மக்கள் எல்லாரும் பெரிய ஆள் மாதிரி நடிக்கிறார்கள். KL பக்கம் இருக்கிறோம் என்று கர்வம். தண்ணீர் பிரச்சனை கூட தீர்க்க முடியாதவர்கள்.
reason: Stereotypes Selangor residents as arrogant while mocking their water supply issues. Inter-state hostility in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு மாநிலத்திற்கும் அதன் சவால்கள் உள்ளன. செலாங்கூரின் நீர் வழங்கல் பிரச்சனை அனைவரின் கவனத்திற்கும் உரியது.

input_text: அரசு கிளினிக்கில் எல்லா நோய்க்கும் paracetamol தான் கொடுப்பார்கள். மருத்துவர்கள் என்ன ரோபோட்டா? சிந்தனை இல்லாமல் மருந்து கொடுக்கிறார்கள்.
reason: Calls government clinic doctors thoughtless robots who only prescribe paracetamol. Dismissive attack on medical professionals.
suggested_rewrite: அரசு கிளினிக்குகளில் மருந்து வகைகள் குறைவாக இருப்பதாக உணர்கிறேன். நோயாளிகளுக்கு தகுந்த மருந்துகள் வழங்க வசதிகள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: தபுங் ஹாஜி கோடிக்கணக்கில் நஷ்டம் அடைந்தும் யாரும் தண்டிக்கப்படவில்லை. சாதாரண மக்கள் ஆயிரம் ரூபாய் கடன் வாங்கினால் வீடு ஜப்தி. இது என்ன நியாயம்?
reason: Highlights perceived double standards between Tabung Haji accountability and ordinary citizens. Emotionally charged comparison.
suggested_rewrite: தபுங் ஹாஜியின் முதலீட்டு நஷ்டங்களுக்கு பொறுப்புக்கூறல் அவசியம். நிறுவன நிர்வாகத்தில் வெளிப்படைத்தன்மை மேம்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: ஜோகூர் மக்கள் தங்கள் மாநிலம் சிங்கப்பூர் மாதிரி என்று நினைக்கிறார்கள். ஆனால் அடிப்படை வசதிகளே சரியில்லை. கனவு காணுங்கள்.
reason: Mocks Johor residents' aspirations by comparing unfavorably to Singapore. Dismissive inter-state prejudice in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: ஜோகூர் வளர்ச்சிக்கான நல்ல திறனைக் கொண்டுள்ளது. அடிப்படை வசதிகளை மேம்படுத்துவதில் கவனம் செலுத்த வேண்டும்.

input_text: Hospital kerajaan tunggu berjam-jam, nurse attitude like they doing you a favour. Balik rumah lagi sakit than before you went in.
reason: Mixed Malay-English rant attacking nurses' attitudes at government hospitals. Implies treatment makes patients worse.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman di hospital kerajaan boleh diperbaiki dengan mengurangkan masa tunggu dan meningkatkan komunikasi antara kakitangan dan pesakit.

input_text: MBPJ buat kerja macam part-time job je. Drainage problem reported last month, still nothing. Our tax money for what exactly?
reason: Mixed language dismissal of MBPJ as treating their work as part-time. Sarcastic questioning of tax expenditure.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah saliran yang dilaporkan sebulan lalu masih belum diselesaikan oleh MBPJ. Tindakan segera amat dihargai.

input_text: Dating app kat Malaysia ni, Chinese girls memang materialistic habis la. First question mesti 'what do you do for work'. Nak interview ke nak date?
reason: Mixed Malay-English stereotyping of Chinese women as materialistic in dating. Racial and gender prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Sesetengah orang di dating app lebih fokus pada kerjaya sebagai cara mengenali seseorang. Setiap orang mempunyai cara tersendiri untuk memulakan perbualan.

input_text: Bomoh zaman sekarang dah upgrade, ada website siap dengan testimonial. But still same old nonsense la. Orang yang percaya ni memang tak boleh ditolong.
reason: Mixed language dismissal of modern bomoh as nonsense. Insults believers as beyond help.
suggested_rewrite: Pengamal perubatan tradisional yang menggunakan platform digital perlu dikawal selia. Pengguna digalakkan untuk membuat pilihan berdasarkan maklumat yang sahih.

input_text: Toll dah naik lagi bro, highway company memang tau makan duit rakyat je. Road condition still the same potholes everywhere.
reason: Mixed language accusation of highway companies profiteering from citizens. Inflammatory rhetoric about toll and road conditions.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan tol perlu disertai peningkatan kualiti jalan raya. Rakyat berhak mendapat perkhidmatan yang setimpal dengan bayaran.

input_text: Selangor people vs Johor people argument lagi kat Twitter. Both sides macam budak kecik berebut siapa lagi hebat. Pathetic gila.
reason: Dismisses inter-state discussions as childish while calling participants pathetic. Condescending tone fuels polarisation.
suggested_rewrite: Perdebatan antara negeri di media sosial sering menjadi tidak produktif. Lebih baik menghargai keunikan setiap negeri.

input_text: KWSP kata kena simpan sampai 55, tapi economy macam ni, rakyat nak survive pun susah. Ironic gila their advice.
reason: Mixed language cynicism about KWSP advice being disconnected from economic reality. Dismissive of institutional guidance.
suggested_rewrite: Nasihat KWSP untuk menyimpan sehingga umur 55 adalah ideal tetapi ekonomi semasa menyukarkan ramai rakyat. Sokongan tambahan diperlukan.

input_text: Tabung Haji punya investment strategy macam main judi. Duit orang tua nak haji pun boleh rugi berbilion. Seriously, who's accountable?
reason: Compares Tabung Haji investments to gambling. Emotionally charged mixed language criticism of religious savings institution.
suggested_rewrite: Strategi pelaburan Tabung Haji perlu lebih berhati-hati dan telus. Akauntabiliti penting untuk mengekalkan kepercayaan pendeposit.

input_text: Pergi government clinic semalam, pharmacist campak ubat je macam tu. No explanation, no nothing. Kita ni patient ke sampah?
reason: Accuses pharmacist of literally throwing medicine. Dehumanising comparison of patients to rubbish.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman di klinik kerajaan semalam kurang memuaskan. Farmasis sepatutnya menerangkan ubat-ubatan yang diberikan kepada pesakit.

input_text: Orang Penang memang famous kedekut, even in the office also calculate who owes who 50 sen. Come on la, it's just 50 sen.
reason: Perpetuates the stingy Penangite stereotype with a specific workplace anecdote. Mixed language inter-state prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Penang dikenali cermat dengan kewangan, yang sebenarnya sifat positif. Kita tak patut jadikan ia bahan ejekan.

input_text: DBKL cakap nak jadikan KL world-class city tapi drain system pun tak boleh handle hujan 30 minit. World class my foot la.
reason: Mocks DBKL's world-class city aspirations by highlighting drainage failures. Rude dismissal with vulgar expression.
suggested_rewrite: Aspirasi KL sebagai bandaraya bertaraf dunia memerlukan peningkatan infrastruktur asas termasuk sistem perparitan yang mampu menangani hujan lebat.

input_text: Hospital emergency ni, you literally boleh mati waiting. Bukan nak dramatic but last time kena tunggu 5 jam with my kid yang demam tinggi.
reason: Hyperbolic claim about dying while waiting in ER. Emotional mixed language complaint about emergency department delays.
suggested_rewrite: Masa menunggu 5 jam di unit kecemasan dengan anak yang demam tinggi sangat mencabar. Sistem triaj perlu diperbaiki untuk kes pediatrik.

input_text: Kelantan orang cakap dia negeri Islam tapi basic infrastructure pun fail. Roads pecah, banjir every year. Islam mana yang ajar jalan berlubang?
reason: Sarcastically links Kelantan's Islamic governance claims to infrastructure failures. Provocative mixing of religion and state criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Kelantan menghadapi cabaran infrastruktur yang perlu ditangani segera. Pengurusan banjir dan penyelenggaraan jalan raya penting untuk kesejahteraan rakyat.

input_text: Malay guys kat dating app semua sweet talker tapi commitment zero. Dah la selalu cakap 'jom lepak' tapi never actually plan a proper date.
reason: Mixed language ethnic stereotyping of Malay men as lacking commitment in dating. Racial generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman dating app berbeza bagi setiap orang. Komunikasi yang jelas tentang expectations membantu kedua-dua pihak.

input_text: MBSA approved so many developments tapi flood mitigation zero planning. Rakyat yang kena every time hujan lebat. They don't care la obviously.
reason: Accuses MBSA of not caring about flood impact on residents. Mixed language inflammatory rhetoric about development approvals.
suggested_rewrite: Pembangunan baharu di bawah MBSA memerlukan penilaian impak alam sekitar yang menyeluruh. Pelan mitigasi banjir perlu diberi keutamaan.
